title: Hangover Brazilian Cure Wrap
description: A savory and spicy wrap to cure your hangover. This dish combines the flavors of Brazil with the comfort of a wrap.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add 2 tablespoons of Brazilian cure and cook for 2 minutes.
Add 1 teaspoon of Hangover cure and cook for another minute.
Add 2 tablespoons of Silky sauce and stir well.
Place a large wrap on a flat surface.
Add the cooked mixture to the center of the wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling.
Fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder.
Serve immediately and enjoy your hangover cure wrap.
